modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need help renaming a header in Excel.

full_description_text: So, during a live chat, someone asked about how to change the name of a header in Excel, right? They were probably trying to make their spreadsheet look all nice and organized, but then they got stuck on this header thing. It’s like, you know, when you want everything to match and be clear, but then Excel just doesn’t make it easy sometimes. I mean, it’s just a header, but it can be super confusing!
short_description: Need help renaming a header in Excel.
